name: Agnostic
boon: No deity bonus or penalty. Accepted by all factions.

name: Bertoxxulous
boon: Disease spells deal 15% more damage. Undead minions are 10% stronger.

name: Brell Serilis
boon: Smithing and mining skill caps increased by 10. Earth elemental pets are 10% stronger.

name: Bristlebane
boon: Random bonus effects trigger 10% more often. Gold reward from quests increased by 15%.

name: Cazic-Thule
boon: Fear spells last 25% longer. Lizard and troll races gain +10 to all stats.

name: Erollisi Marr
boon: Healing spells restore 10% more HP. Group buff durations increased by 15%.

name: Innoruuk
boon: Charm and fear spells are 20% more effective. Dark elf race gains +15 INT and CHA.

name: Karana
boon: Outdoor zones grant 10% bonus XP. Ranged attacks deal 5% more damage.

name: Mithaniel Marr
boon: Combat abilities deal 10% more damage. Human and half-elf races gain +10 STR and STA.

name: Prexus
boon: Swimming skill at cap from start. Water-based spells deal 10% more damage.

name: Quellious
boon: Meditation skill cap increased by 25. Mana regeneration is 10% faster.

name: Rallos Zek
boon: Melee damage increased by 8%. Ogre and troll races gain +15 STR.

name: Rodcet Nife
boon: HP regeneration is 15% faster. Disease and poison resist increased by 20.

name: Solusek Ro
boon: Fire spells deal 15% more damage. Spell critical hit chance increased by 5%.

name: Tunare
boon: Foraging yields double results. Wood elf and high elf races gain +15 WIS and INT.
